creator: fagreco@verizon.net
text:
FreeBSD 11 current package for firefox plays sound as root but not as user. Konqueror works fine. Disabling alsa and compiling did not fix problem. Disabling pulse audio did fix problem. I did not have this problem with FreeBSD 10.2. I'm happy with things as they are but, as an aesthetic point, I wanted to let you know in case you wanted to fix it.

Regards,

Frank Greco
